# TKO to buy IMG, On Location, PBR from Endeavor for $3.25bn

SportzPower Team

TKO Group Holdings, Inc. (TKO), the sports and entertainment company that was spun off last year by Endeavor Group Holdings and listed on the New York Stock Exchange, announced Thursday it would acquire three of Endeavor’s major businesses – IMG, On Location, and Professional Bull Riders (PBR), in an all-equity transaction valued at $3.25 billion.", "score": 0.826278, "raw_content": null}]

steps.args: {'prompt': 'Search for information about the acquisition of Endeavor assets (such as Professional Bull Riders (PBR), On Location, and IMG) or any other Endeavor assets. What was the total consideration cost TKO paid or is expected to pay, or what was the transaction details? Is there any mention of the transaction closing or the consideration measured at transaction close? {{tko_10k_2024}}'}
steps.result:
Based on the provided 10-K document for TKO Group Holdings, Inc., here are the details regarding the acquisition of the Endeavor assets (the **Endeavor Asset Acquisition**):

### 1. Total Consideration Cost and Transaction Details
* **Acquired Assets:** TKO entered into a definitive agreement to acquire the **Professional Bull Riders (PBR)**, **On Location**, and **IMG** businesses (including the IMG Media business and certain other businesses operating under the IMG brand) from subsidiaries of Endeavor.
* **Total Consideration:** TKO is expected to pay a total consideration of **$3.25 billion**. This valuation was determined based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO’s Class A common stock for the 25 trading days ending on October 23, 2024.
* **Payment Structure:** 
  * Endeavor will receive approximately **26.1 million common units of TKO Operating Company, LLC (TKO OpCo)**.
  * Endeavor will subscribe for an equal number of shares of **TKO’s Class B common stock**.
  * This consideration is subject to certain customary purchase price adjustments to be settled at the closing in equity and cash.
* **Post-Transaction Ownership:** Upon closing, Endeavor is expected to own approximately **61% of the voting interests of TKO** (up from approximately 53.9% as of December 31, 2024).
* **Termination of Services Agreement:** Upon the close of the acquisition, the existing Services Agreement between Endeavor and TKO OpCo will be terminated, and they expect to enter into a new transition services agreement.

---

### 2. Transaction Closing and Consideration Measured at Close
* **Expected Closing Date:** The transaction is expected to close in the **first quarter of 2025**, subject to customary closing conditions (such as regulatory approvals and stockholder approval, the latter of which has already been satisfied via written consent).
* **Consideration Measured/Adjusted at Close:** The 10-K notes that the final consideration is subject to **"certain customary purchase price adjustments to be settled at the closing in equity and cash."**
* **Accounting Treatment at Close:** Because Endeavor controls TKO, the transaction will be accounted for as a **merger between entities under common control**. 
  * Rather than measuring the assets at fair value at the transaction close (as in typical acquisition accounting), the net assets of the acquired PBR, On Location, and IMG businesses will be combined with TKO's at their **historical carrying amounts**. 
  * Consequently, TKO's financial results for historical periods will be retrospectively restated and presented on a combined basis once the transaction closes.

steps.args: {'prompt': 'What was the total consideration cost TKO paid to acquire Endeavor assets (PBR, On Location, IMG) measured at transaction close? Look for details of the transaction close on February 28, 2025, and the final consideration paid or measured at close. {{tko_8k_feb28_2025}}'}
steps.result:
Based on the Form 8-K filed on February 28, 2025, the total consideration cost TKO paid to acquire the Endeavor assets (PBR, On Location, and IMG) is **$3.30 billion** (measured using the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the 25 trading days ending on October 23, 2024). 

The breakdown of this consideration is as follows:

1. **Closing Consideration:** **$3.25 billion** 
   * Paid in approximately **26.1 million TKO Common Units** and an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock.
2. **Purchase Price Adjustment:** **$50 million** (to be settled in equity)
   * Consisting of approximately **400,000 TKO Common Units** and an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock.

steps.args: {'prompt': 'Please extract the exact text from the 8-K filing that describes the total consideration cost, closing consideration, and purchase price adjustment. {{tko_8k_feb28_2025}}'}
steps.result:
Here is the exact text from the 8-K filing (under **Item 2.01. Completion of Acquisition or Disposition of Assets**) that describes the closing consideration, total consideration value, and the purchase price adjustment:

> "At the effective time of the Transactions (the “Effective Time”), the EDR Parties contributed, assigned, conveyed, delivered and transferred to TKO the Transferred Businesses, in exchange for approximately 26.1 million TKO Common Units, having an aggregate value of $3.25 billion (based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty five trading days ending on October 23, 2024), and subscribed for an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock (the “Closing Consideration”). The Closing Consideration is also subject to a purchase price adjustment to be settled in equity consisting of approximately four hundred thousand TKO Common Units, having an aggregate value of $50 million (based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty five trading days ending on October 23, 2024) and an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock."

steps.result:
Yes, the document mentions the total consideration cost for the Endeavor Asset Acquisition (which includes PBR, On Location, and the IMG Media Business). 

Here are the extracted details and numbers regarding the transaction consideration:

* **Total Consideration Cost:** Approximately **$3.25 billion** plus a **$50 million purchase price adjustment** (calculated based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty-five trading days ending on October 23, 2024).
* **Equity Issued:** Endeavor received approximately **26.54 million common units** of TKO and subscribed for an equal number of shares of TKO PubCo’s **Class B Common Stock**.
* **Transaction Close Date:** The acquisition was completed on **February 28, 2025**. 

The document notes that because the historical financial data discussed in the report relates to periods prior to the closing of the acquisition, it does not reflect the full impact of the transaction, and points to the Form 8-K filed on February 28, 2025, for further details.

steps.args: {'prompt': 'Please extract all text under Item 2.01 of the 8-K filed on February 28, 2025. {{tko_8k_feb28_2025}}'}
steps.result:
Here is the text extracted from under **Item 2.01** of the 8-K filing:

***

**Item 2.01. Completion of Acquisition or Disposition of Assets.**

At the effective time of the Transactions (the “Effective Time”), the EDR Parties contributed, assigned, conveyed, delivered and transferred to TKO the Transferred Businesses, in exchange for approximately 26.1 million TKO Common Units, having an aggregate value of $3.25 billion (based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty five trading days ending on October 23, 2024), and subscribed for an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock (the “Closing Consideration”). The Closing Consideration is also subject to a purchase price adjustment to be settled in equity consisting of approximately four hundred thousand TKO Common Units, having an aggregate value of $50 million (based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty five trading days ending on October 23, 2024) and an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock.

The foregoing description of the material terms of the Transaction Agreement and the Transactions is qualified in its entirety by reference to the full text of the Transaction Agreement and the Transaction Agreement Amendment, copies of which are filed as Exhibits 10.1 and 10.2, respectively, of this Current Report on Form 8-K and is incorporated by reference herein.

The information set forth in the “Explanatory Note” and Item 1.01 of this Current Report on Form 8-K is incorporated herein by reference.
